title: gouldia sandwicensis var. coriacea
intro: Gouldia sandwicensis var. coriacea, also known as the coriaceous gouldia, is a variant of the Gouldia sandwicensis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The coriaceous gouldia is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In traditional Hawaiian herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
